golden_cases.notes: Guild-order list state before selecting or verifying one order.
Guild-order detail state where submit or refresh may be considered.
Supporting insufficient-material state used to verify skip or refresh decisions honestly.
Supporting already-completed state used to verify skip decisions honestly.
Supporting post-submit result state used to verify successful submission honestly.

steps.success_condition: Guild-order list is visible and stable enough for fixed-UI inspection.
steps.failure_condition: Guild-order list cannot be reached through deterministic navigation.
steps.notes: Round 9 keeps navigation bounded to the fixed guild-order UI only.

steps.success_condition: The current order slot, visible requirement, and visible available-material state can be classified honestly.
steps.failure_condition: The current order requirement or visible quantity state remains ambiguous.
steps.notes: No freeform OCR-only inference is allowed in this first cut.

steps.success_condition: The task chooses submit, skip, or refresh from machine-readable material policy and visible evidence only.
steps.failure_condition: No truthful bounded decision can be made from visible state and configured policy.
steps.notes: This step must not introduce crafting, buying, gathering, or pathing as hidden dependencies.

steps.success_condition: The selected bounded decision path is applied without expanding beyond submit, skip, or refresh.
steps.failure_condition: Submit or refresh affordances are missing when the bounded decision requires them.
steps.notes: Skip remains an explicit no-action path that still records the reason honestly.

steps.success_condition: The task verifies the chosen submit, skip, or refresh outcome with truthful post-decision evidence.
steps.failure_condition: The bounded decision outcome cannot be verified from stable guild-order UI evidence.
steps.notes: Round 9 requires honest verification instead of assuming the action succeeded.

guild_order_material_policy.notes: Round 9 only allows submit, skip, or refresh when the visible order requirement and visible quantity evidence are sufficient for a truthful bounded decision.

decision_rules.submit: Visible requirement is allowed and visible available quantity satisfies the configured reserve policy.
decision_rules.skip: Visible order is already completed, refresh is disallowed, or no truthful bounded action remains after policy evaluation.
decision_rules.refresh: Visible order is unsuitable and one bounded refresh remains allowed by policy.

guild_order_decision_contract.notes: Unknown order state should fail honestly instead of inventing a fourth hidden action path.

guild_order_visibility_contract.notes: Round 9 remains blocked until visible quantities and post-decision result states are truthful and deterministic.

notes: Round-9 specification-only blueprint for deterministic guild-order submit / skip / refresh logic using visible material evidence only.

task_manifest.entry_condition: Guild panel and guild-order list are reachable through deterministic menu navigation and the account belongs to a guild.
task_manifest.failure_condition: The order state, visible material evidence, or bounded verification path cannot be classified honestly.
task_manifest.name: Guild Order Submit

stop_conditions.message: Guild-order submit fixture exceeded task-side timeout.
Operator stop should abort guild-order submit immediately.
Expected guild-order anchors did not match stable UI.

task_manifest.success_condition: The task reaches a truthful submit, skip, or refresh outcome and records why that outcome was chosen.
